# Fixture: april_salinas_stuck_orientation
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 63.9s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi April! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I divided the modules but it won't let me finish the 5 min last part of it so I Can unlock shifts
Concierge: Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually refreshes things.
Partner: I finished the modules
Concierge: You're all set — you can start picking up shifts now! Open the Shifts tab to see what's available.
Partner: It still not letting me. I can't get the 10$ for finishing because it won't let me finish

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You're probably stuck on the certification call step. Tap the message icon in the top right corner, then "Send us a message" and start a new chat — let them know you're stuck on the cert call and they'll help you finish so you can get your $10.
